name: The Flensing
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: truth wielded as violence. They tell everything to everyone, always, and call the ruin honesty. Marriages, cities, and people come apart in their presence and they walk on satisfied. They are not lying. That is the whole horror of them — every word is true.
encounterFlavor: The Flensers, who will strip you in a sentence and be correct; the wreckage they leave, which is real wreckage; the terrible temptation to join in.
questSeeds: The Flensers are coming to the Valley to say some true things
Someone has invited them, on purpose, to destroy an enemy — and the truths are real
